name: NSM Launch Event
htmlDesc: 3D anamorphic film for Novo Nordisk's national sales meeting, tracing the brand's insulin heritage from 1960 through to the Insuject-X pen. Built for a large-format LED stage and played to around 900 sales and medical staff over a 3-day meet.

name: Excon Billboard
htmlDesc: Title reveal for CII EXCON 2023, billed as 'The Largest Ever' edition of South Asia's premier construction equipment expo. Staged as a 3D anamorphic piece on the venue's main LED, seen by a footfall of around 70,000 visitors over 5 days.

name: Aditya Birla Analyst Day
htmlDesc: Pan-India anamorphic visual for Aditya Birla Capital, framing the brand across glowing maps of the country. Produced for the company's annual leadership conclave and presented to around 500 guests.

name: HDFC Annual Sparsh
htmlDesc: Anamorphic stage content for HDFC Life's Annual Sparsh 2024, carrying the brand's signature growth-arrow motif. Created for the annual flagship event and shown to about 800 attendees.

name: Mindgate
htmlDesc: Anamorphic brand reveal for Mindgate — 'Delivering Innovation' — staged inside a clean light-box environment. Produced for a fintech industry summit with around 400 attendees.

name: Aminjaz
htmlDesc: A set of CGI motion frames produced under the Aminjaz banner — a hero prop study, a playful whack-a-DJ concept, and a neon arcade machine. Three distinct ideas tied together by bold lighting and clean render craft.

name: Stuvi
htmlDesc: CGI motion and visual content produced for Stuvi.

name: Kimera
htmlDesc: CGI motion and visual content produced for Kimera.

name: The Sincerities
htmlDesc: Two CGI motion pieces for The Sincerities — a moonlit beach-house drive and a bold yellow colour study. Atmospheric, cinematic visuals built to set a mood.

name: Fila
htmlDesc: CGI brand film for FILA, with the glowing FILA wordmark riding the back of a truck speeding down an open highway. The cinematic motion and neon treatment give the sportswear brand a bold, on-the-move energy. Created to hype FILA x AYC at Jio World, Mumbai.

name: Ace Blends
htmlDesc: Full CGI product film for Ace Blends, featuring the ABG Blend Shroom Coffee pack moving along a robotic production line. Sleek mechanical arms and warm metallic tones give the functional-beverage brand a futuristic, premium edge. Engineered to make the launch date land with impact.

name: Footlocker
htmlDesc: Motion design and product visuals for a Foot Locker drop. The brand's striped-referee mark is revealed inside a rugged hardcase, framing the release like a prized, protected collectible. A tight, suspenseful reveal made for sneaker-launch hype.

name: Crocs
htmlDesc: Stylised brand CGI for Crocs, staging a pair of classic clogs decked with Jibbitz charms against a rain-flecked sunset landscape. The dreamy, cinematic setting turns an everyday product into a mood piece. Built to feel playful and aspirational for a lifestyle-led campaign.

name: Paapi
htmlDesc: Moody CGI product visual for Paapi Coffee Absinthe, with the labelled bottle resting on a wooden table against a dusk beach backdrop. The mellow, atmospheric lighting leans into the drink's craft, after-dark identity. Made to feel intimate, premium and brand-distinct.

name: Kitty Party - Karan Kanchan
htmlDesc: Set visuals and live coverage for Karan Kanchan's 'Kitty Party' show, drenched in signature pink-and-blue stage light. Shot largely from behind the decks, the frames capture both the artist in flow and the crowd going off in front of him. A bold, high-energy gallery built to carry the party's identity online.

name: Halloween - Dev Raiyani
htmlDesc: Event coverage for antiSOCIAL's Halloween Bash, a packed warehouse strung with cobwebs and ghouls under eerie red and green light. The photography captures the haunted-house production design and the costumed crowd in full swing. Moody, atmospheric frames that bottle the chaos of the night.
